title: 有馬記念の後に・アクナレッジメント

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the winner of the sister showdown of the
century is Biwa Hayahide! Biwa Hayahide takes
home the big win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I did it...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I beat Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sis.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You really are fast.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Brian...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I knew signing up for this race was the right thing
to do. I got to see you at your best.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Chasing after you made me remember how we
used to run together when we were kids.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
All I wanted was to pass whoever was in front of
me. And it wasn't out of a desperate need, just
pure—

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Ha-ya-hi-de! Ha-ya-hi-de!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch... I can't even hear myself think. I'll talk to
you later.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wait, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I want to know. As I am now...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Am I a big sister you can be proud of?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Pfft, what are you even talking about?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I've always been proud of you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At long last, the sibling showdown is settled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As it turns out, what lies beyond the equal sign of
Biwa Hayahide's winning equation... is victory.
